trigger: Framework sync — local configs were out of sync with remote repo

summary.502_type: all from initial restart period (09:31-09:35), Connection refused

429_pattern.pattern: Spread across all hours, not bursty. Avg ~6%. NOT RPM-related — all are quota exhaustion from ModelScope (shared across both machines).

framework_sync.description: Local /opt/cc-infra configs were out of sync with remote repo. All 4 config files were copied from remote (correct) to local.
files_synced: litellm-glm51-test/config.yaml (41003) — cooldown_time 7200→10, anchor zhipuai→ZHIPUAI, header TEST→Production, variant list identical
docker-compose.yml — +KEY2-7 for 41003, +ulimits nofile, memory 1536→2048M, 40001/40002 routing→41003, postgres expose not ports

why.evidence: Post-sync metrics: 70 429 insufficient_quota out of 1139 req (6.1%). 429 avg latency = 3948ms (= ~5×800ms per retry attempt). With 7000 deployments (1000 variants × 7 keys), 8 retries gives more chances to find a deployment where that specific variant+key combo has remaining quota.
why.logic: Both machines share the same 7 keys and 1000 variant IDs → ModelScope quota is shared → faster per-variant exhaustion. Each retry tries a different (variant, key) combination. More retries = higher probability of hitting a combo with remaining quota.
why.risk: 8 retries worst case = ~6400ms latency if all fail. Currently 5 retries = ~3948ms avg. 8 retries adds ~2.4s worst case per 429, but could reduce 429 rate by finding available deployments.

docker_compose_changes.ulimits_fix: ulimit→ulimits (compose v5 syntax) — applied to both local and repo
